overview: Comprehensive architectural exploration covering system design, business logic, data flows, error handling, authentication, missing systems, known issues, and code quality

1_system_architecture.description: Complete component/route hierarchy, data flow patterns, and integration points

key_files: src/routes/__root.tsx - Root layout with AuthProvider wrapper
src/auth.tsx - AuthContext for session & role management
src/routes/_app.tsx - Protected app layout with auth redirect

architecture.state_management: React Query (server state) + React Context (auth session)
architecture.css: Tailwind CSS with custom shadcn/ui components

entry_points: api/entry.ts - HTTP handler for Vercel/Node deployment
src/server.ts - Server entry point with error recovery

ai_services.usage_tracking: Per-user quota enforcement with cost calculation

api_flow.client_request: Browser sends Bearer token in Authorization header
api_flow.server_execution: createServerFn handler runs with supabaseAdmin client

data_flow_diagrams.authentication: Client login → Supabase Auth → Session stored → Bearer token extraction → Server validation
data_flow_diagrams.transaction: User submits transaction → validateHoldings/Cash → RPC upsert_holding_buy/sell → Audit log → Portfolio snapshot recompute
data_flow_diagrams.market_data: Cron trigger (CRON_SECRET) → Yahoo Finance fetch → Upsert eod_prices → Recompute snapshots → Update KBAI index
data_flow_diagrams.ai_operation: User triggers AI → Quota check → Lovable API call → Token counting → Cost calculation → Usage log

1_system_architecture.severity: HIGH - Well-structured, but missing monitoring layers

2_business_logic_patterns.description: Recurring patterns in data processing, validation, and mutation

flow: Adjust cash balance via adjust_cash_balance RPC

user_management.flow: Admin triggers → Supabase auth.admin.* → Role inserted → Audit logged
functions: adminCreateUser - Creates user with email confirmation
adminDeleteUser - Only if not last admin
user_management.protection: DUP-04 pattern - admin role verified by middleware, not client input

functions: adminRevokeSession - Mark session inactive (not force logout)
session_tracking.limitation: Cannot remotely force browser logout—session marked revoked but user must refresh

ai_operations.pattern: Quota-limited AI calls with cost tracking
flow: Call Lovable AI with timeout (40s default)
ai_operations.disclaimer_requirement: All AI outputs wrapped with financial disclaimer

steps: Get distinct tickers from active holdings
market_data_refresh.performance_optimization: Incremental RPC calls (upsert_holding_buy/sell) instead of full recompute

error_handling_in_mutations.example: If audit log insert fails, error logged to console but main operation not blocked

2_business_logic_patterns.severity: MEDIUM - Patterns clear but need distributed tracing

3_query_patterns.description: Database query construction, N+1 patterns, indexing, efficiency

high_risk.issue: Runs on EVERY admin API call—could be cached in token claims
high_risk.frequency: Every admin operation (list users, update settings, etc)

high_risk.issue: Two DB queries on page load + auth check

medium_risk.query: SELECT * FROM holdings, then N loop to fetch prices
medium_risk.issue: Could still be slow if huge portfolio count

missing_indexes.user_2fa: No index on user_id—2FA lookup on every admin login check
missing_indexes.cash_balances: No indexes present—cash validation queries unindexed
missing_indexes.system_settings: No index on key—setting lookups sequential scan

soft_delete_performance.pattern: All queries now include .is('deleted_at', null) filters
soft_delete_performance.performance_impact: Filter clause on every query—consider index on (deleted_at, user_id)

query_complexity.highest: getCommunityEquitySeries - Aggregates portfolio_snapshots across all users per date
query_complexity.pattern: Map-reduce in memory after DB fetch

3_query_patterns.severity: HIGH - Multiple N+1 risks and missing indexes on hot paths

4_error_handling_strategy.description: Error catching, logging, reporting throughout the system

global_error_capture.limitation: Only captures last error in 5 second window—race condition possible

http_error_handling.shows: Error message from thrown error, with 'Try again' and 'Go home' buttons
http_error_handling.limitation: Generic—doesn't distinguish between auth errors, validation errors, server errors

server_error_recovery.pattern: Catches SSR h3 errors and returns branded HTML error page
server_error_recovery.limitation: h3 swallows throws—only sees generic 500 with {unhandled: true}

server_function_error_handling.audit_log_pattern: Errors logged but don't block—non-blocking failure
server_function_error_handling.missing: No errorContext propagation for distributed tracing

financial_disclaimer.requirement: Must be shown on all AI-generated financial content
financial_disclaimer.compliance: Protects from liability but users may ignore

4_error_handling_strategy.severity: MEDIUM - Basic error capture present, but missing structured logging and correlation IDs

5_authentication_and_authorization.description: Complete auth flow, session management, 2FA, role-based access, RLS policies

login_process: Check if user is admin/advisor (from user_roles table)
If privileged, verify 2FA enabled—if not, throw 'MFA_REQUIRED'

session_management.storage: Supabase JS client handles session in localStorage
session_management.timing_issue: Hard refresh may cause phantom redirect to /login before session restored
session_management.root_cause: getSession() returns null immediately, should use getUser() instead
session_management.workaround: Current code uses getUser() but timing race condition may still exist

setup_flow: Recovery codes generated and stored hashed
two_factor_authentication.disable: disable2fa() removes TOTP secret (requires current code)

role_based_access_control.enforcement: Middleware checks roles before handler execution

token_handling.missing: No role claim in JWT—separate DB query needed per request

rls_policies.pattern: SELECT/UPDATE/DELETE restricted to owner or admin
example_tables: holdings - user can only see their own
transactions - user can only see their own
notifications - user can only see their own

bootstrap_admin.purpose: Promote first user to admin on first signup
bootstrap_admin.protection: Only runs if no admin exists

5_authentication_and_authorization.severity: MEDIUM - Auth implemented but has timing race condition issues, role caching could improve performance

missing: Custom metrics (transaction volume, market data latency)
Uptime monitoring beyond basic health check

feature_flags.impact: Cannot safely roll out new features to subset of users

7_known_bugs_and_issues.description: Reported login navigation and Vercel deployment issues, systemic implications

symptoms: User reports being redirected to /login on every page reload
Authenticated users getting bounced to login
login_navigation_phantom_redirect.issue_detail: getSession() returns null immediately on hard refresh before browser's localStorage auth state is restored
login_navigation_phantom_redirect.attempted_fix: Using getUser() instead of getSession() (more reliable server-side lookup)
login_navigation_phantom_redirect.remaining_problem: Still a timing race—socket mismatch between client session and server validation
login_navigation_phantom_redirect.workaround: requireSupabaseAuth middleware validates token—but timing gap causes intermittent redirect

symptoms: Build or runtime errors on Vercel
Documented in VERCEL_DEPLOYMENT.md but lack detail
probable_causes: Build output mismatch (dist/ structure differs between local and Vercel)
API route configuration in vercel.json may not match actual handler
CSP headers may block external API calls

vercel_json_config.limitation: Catch-all rewrite may hide trailing errors

vercel_deployment_errors.csp_header: Restricts connect-src to specific supabase.co and localhost—may block requests
investigation_needed: Check Vercel Function logs for actual error
Verify all env vars set: SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, CRON_SECRET
Test build locally with `npm run build` then `npm run preview`
Check CSP violations in browser DevTools

systemic_issues_these_reveal.issue_1: Session hydration race condition—auth state not reliably restored on page load
systemic_issues_these_reveal.issue_2: Environment variable configuration fragile—easy to miss required vars
systemic_issues_these_reveal.issue_3: Limited deployment testing—no staging environment documented
systemic_issues_these_reveal.issue_4: Error handling doesn't distinguish between auth failures and other errors
systemic_issues_these_reveal.consequence: Users experience unpredictable redirects and broken deployments

7_known_bugs_and_issues.severity: CRITICAL - Directly impacts user experience and deployment reliability

8_code_quality_metrics.description: Test coverage, linting strictness, type safety, tech debt, dependencies

e2e_tests: e2e/basic.spec.ts—only 2 smoke tests (homepage title, login page loads)

test_setup.config: vitest.config.ts - jsdom environment, global test utilities

missing: Unit tests for business logic (portfolio calculations, AI quota)

any_usage: Indicates defensive coding but type gaps remain
type_safety.zod_validation: All API inputs validated with Zod schemas—good coverage

linting.ci_enforcement: npm run lint:ci (--max-warnings 0) in GitHub Actions
linting.missing: No specific financial calculation validation rules

structure.src/lib/: Business logic functions (portfolio, market-data, admin, etc)

dependency_management.bundle_size: Rollup optimizations in vite.config.ts include manual chunks

high: N+1 query on admin role check (every API call)
medium: Ad-hoc error handling without central strategy
Soft delete not fully integrated (added recently)

optimization.code_splitting: Manual chunks for router, ui, supabase, charts, pdf, excel, crypto

8_code_quality_metrics.severity: HIGH - Low test coverage and scattered tech debt, but type safety reasonable

summary_and_recommendations.readiness_for_production: CONDITIONAL - Needs fixes for session auth and monitoring

top_5_critical_fixes.fix: Implement retry logic or better session hydration detection
Add correlation IDs, request logging middleware, APM dashboard

top_5_critical_fixes.issue: N+1 role query on every admin API call
top_5_critical_fixes.fix: Cache roles in JWT claims or Redis
Implement Supabase automated backups, RTO/RPO targets
Add unit + integration tests for core business logic

architectural_strengths: Type-safe database queries with Zod validation
Good use of middleware for cross-cutting concerns
